title: A shaded dimension in the clouds
description: I dimension in the clouds with shaders and frames (not 1-5 but  like 100+)
body:
Did you ever wanted to play the aether with shaders, but it was too laggy?
this modpack is all about that! Mods like sodium, iris are encluded along with other performance mods.There are shaders with the config I saw give the best FPS encluded.
I **DO NOT OWN THE ORIGINAL AETHER MOD.**
